description: This file defines API endpoints for authentication in a FastAPI application, including login handling and fetching current user details.

classes.name: APIRouter
classes.description: FastAPI router instance for grouping authentication related endpoints.

classes.name: TokenResponse
classes.description: Schema for the access token response.

classes.name: MeResponse
classes.description: Schema for the current user response.

methods.name: TokenResponse login(req: Request, payload: LoginRequest, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Handles user login, authenticates credentials, and returns a JWT token.

methods.name: MeResponse me(user: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user))
methods.description: Returns information about the current authenticated user.

ctags.name: login
ctags.pattern: /^async def login(req: Request, payload: LoginRequest, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session))/
ctags.signature: (req: Request, payload: LoginRequest, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session))
